title: BLANCHET HOUSE RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM - 211info
text: BLANCHET HOUSE OF HOSPITALITY BLANCHET HOUSE RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 7-9 month residential living program with case management services. Residents start with in-house work programs and progress to securing stable, independent employment. Residents must maintain sobriety for the duration of the program. 310 NW Glisan Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older who are in recovery from substance abuse issues. Individuals with convictions for arson or sex offenses are not allowed into the program. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 337-8747 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Screening (971) 337-8747 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Saturday 8am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in NW Portland (Old Town / Chinatown). Served by TriMet bus lines 4, 8, 35, 44, and MAX Blue, Green, Red, and Yellow lines. Services: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Men Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - MEAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
